query:
SELECT p.batchNo, p.productName, p.importedBrandName, p.importedCategoryName, p.categoryId AS productCategoryId, se.id AS stationEventId, se.stationCode, se.categoryId AS eventCategoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.countForProductivity, psd.id AS kpiDetailId
FROM products p
JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete' AND se.stationCode = 'A1'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.batchNo;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT p.batchNo, p.productName, p.importedBrandName, p.importedCategoryName, p.categoryId AS productCategoryId, se.id AS stationEventId, se.stationCode, se.categoryId AS eventCategoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.countForProductivity, psd.id AS kpiDetailId
FROM products p
JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete' AND se.stationCode = 'A1'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.batchNo;
